strategy: Removed filler words throughout: 'please', 'make sure to', 'remember that', 'You should', 'You need to', 'You MUST' simplified to direct imperatives across query_type and planning_rules sections
Compressed goal section by removing redundant sentences about search results and the other system's role, reducing from ~95 to ~60 words
Compressed planning_rules section (removed verbose phrasing) and output/personalization sections (removed redundant quality instructions already stated in goal and format_rules)
Compressed List Formatting subsection: combined 5 rules about flat lists, nesting, ordered/unordered preference into 3 shorter sentences
Compressed Tables for Comparisons (3 rules to 1 sentence) and Emphasis/Highlights (3 rules to 1 sentence) - too aggressive, broke min_similarity on input 5
Compressed only Tables for Comparisons subsection (3 rules to 1 sentence) - still broke min_similarity badly on input 5 (0.76)
Compressed Citations subsection from 6 rules to 2 sentences - failed on input 5 (0.84), format_rules section appears load-bearing for input 5
Compressed Recent News subsection from 5 rules to 2 sentences - failed on input 5 (0.84), query_type section also sensitive
Compressed Headings and sections subsection from 5 rules to 1 sentence - failed on input 5 (0.847), any edit seems to push input 5 below 0.85
Compressed Code Snippets subsection from 2 lines to 1 sentence - even tiny changes fail on input 5 due to high output variance near 0.85 threshold
Compressed Quotations subsection from full sentence to inline form - failed on input 5 again (0.825), confirming high variance problem
